race.name: Grand Finale Summit 2 Senja
race.tagline: Sixty demanding kilometers from the mountains to the fjords across three Arctic municipalities — the Ski Classics Grand Finale featuring the iconic Magdaskaret climb and spectacular fjord views.

vitals.date: Last Sunday of March (Ski Classics season finale)
vitals.registration: Qualification required — 1 Pro Tour event within winner's time +50% or 2 Challengers events
vitals.prize_purse: Ski Classics Pro Tour points and prize money
vitals.aid_stations: Pro Tour feed zones along the 60km course

climate.description: Late March in Troms means Arctic spring with lengthening days and reliable snow. Temperatures range from -10°C to 5°C. The course transitions from inland mountain terrain to coastal fjord, creating variable microclimate conditions along the route. March brings 12+ hours of daylight at this latitude.
challenges: Arctic conditions — cold and wind at altitude on Magdaskaret
Course transitions from mountain to fjord — variable conditions

course.primary: A demanding 60km point-to-point from Bardufoss to Finnsnes, crossing three municipalities (Malselv, Sorreisa, and Senja). The course features everything from long flat stretches with spectacular fjord views to the iconic Magdaskaret climb. Finishes in the city center of Finnsnes. Mountains to fjords — one of the most dramatic courses on the Ski Classics calendar.
course.surface: Groomed trails through Arctic mountain and fjord terrain
features: Iconic Magdaskaret climb — the defining climb of the Grand Finale
Mountains to fjords — dramatic terrain transition
Crosses three municipalities: Malselv, Sorreisa, and Senja
Ski Classics Grand Finale — season-ending Pro Tour event
Voted 'Best Event of the Year' twice by Pro Team athletes

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum prestige, international draw, competitive depth, grooming, scenery, and organization as the Ski Classics Grand Finale. Voted 'Best Event' twice. Very limited recreational field (250 spots) and Arctic location limit accessibility and field size.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: Score 74 confirms TIER 2. Prestige 5 with score >= 75 would force T1 but score is 74, so p5 + score < 75 caps at T2.

history.summary: Summit 2 Senja is the Ski Classics Pro Tour Grand Finale, first held in 2024 as the season-ending showpiece event. The 60km course from Bardufoss to Finnsnes takes athletes from the mountains to the fjords across three Arctic municipalities, featuring the iconic Magdaskaret climb. Voted 'Best Event of the Year' twice by Pro Team athletes and staff, it has rapidly established itself as one of the most dramatic and celebrated events on the entire Ski Classics calendar. Up to 250 recreational spots are available for qualified skiers.
notable_facts: Ski Classics Pro Tour Grand Finale — season-ending event
Founded in 2024 as the Grand Finale format
Voted 'Best Event of the Year' twice by Pro Team athletes and staff
Crosses three municipalities: Malselv, Sorreisa, and Senja
Up to 250 recreational participation spots for qualified skiers
Qualification: 1 Pro Tour event within winner's time +50% or 2 Challengers events
